briefs.summary: 本輪 9 天鎖定「獨立咖啡店」。每一天都有 9 張分開生成、視覺一致但版式不同的完整圖卡，不產生九宮格。

items.purpose: 品牌初識｜為什麼我們慢一點
items.text:
Generate exactly ONE standalone Instagram carousel card, slide 1 of 9. Do not create a collage, contact sheet, grid, multiple cards, phone mockup or surrounding white canvas. Output aspect ratio 4:5, 1080×1350, edge-to-edge. This card belongs to a coordinated nine-card system for 獨立咖啡店, topic “品牌初識｜為什麼我們慢一點”. Visual system: editorial lifestyle photography, warm cream paper texture, espresso brown and muted sage, soft morning sunlight, restrained organic shapes, subtle film grain, consistent 80px safe margin. Use the same brand world as the other cards but make this composition distinct. Layout: hero cover: headline in the upper-left, large coffee photograph in the lower-right. Render this Traditional-Chinese sample copy as visible, professionally typeset text:
LOGO：Mori Café
小主題／KICKER：TODAY'S PAUSE
大主題／HEADLINE：一杯咖啡，也可以是今天的休息鍵
內文／BODY：讓日常慢一點，也讓選擇更適合自己。
MOOD：今天不必很快，也能好好前進。
CTA：向左滑看下一張 →
HASHTAG：#MoriCafe #咖啡日常 #慢生活
頁碼：1/9

items.purpose: 可販售模板
items.text: CANVA TEMPLATE SPEC｜1080×1350 px, 9 separate pages. Safe margin 80 px. Rebuild each generated reference with named editable layers: LOGO, KICKER, HEADLINE, BODY, MOOD, CTA, HASHTAG, PAGE_NO, PHOTO and DECORATIVE_ELEMENT. Use at most two font families and three brand colors. Build page 1 cover, pages 2–8 alternating education/story layouts, page 9 CTA. Use the generated cards only as layout references; replace their baked text with editable Canva text and replace photography with its own frame. Save as a master design, duplicate before each client edit, then create a Brand Template link for customers.

items.purpose: 可販售模板
items.text: CANVA TEMPLATE SPEC｜1080×1350 px, 9 separate pages. Safe margin 80 px. Rebuild each generated reference with named editable layers: LOGO, KICKER, HEADLINE, BODY, MOOD, CTA, HASHTAG, PAGE_NO, PHOTO and DECORATIVE_ELEMENT. Use at most two font families and three brand colors. Build page 1 cover, pages 2–8 alternating education/story layouts, page 9 CTA. Use the generated cards only as layout references; replace their baked text with editable Canva text and replace photography with its own frame. Save as a master design, duplicate before each client edit, then create a Brand Template link for customers.

items.purpose: 空間體驗｜找到適合你的座位
items.text:
Generate exactly ONE standalone Instagram carousel card, slide 1 of 9. Do not create a collage, contact sheet, grid, multiple cards, phone mockup or surrounding white canvas. Output aspect ratio 4:5, 1080×1350, edge-to-edge. This card belongs to a coordinated nine-card system for 獨立咖啡店, topic “空間體驗｜找到適合你的座位”. Visual system: editorial lifestyle photography, warm cream paper texture, espresso brown and muted sage, soft morning sunlight, restrained organic shapes, subtle film grain, consistent 80px safe margin. Use the same brand world as the other cards but make this composition distinct. Layout: hero cover: headline in the upper-left, large coffee photograph in the lower-right. Render this Traditional-Chinese sample copy as visible, professionally typeset text:

HASHTAG：#MoriCafe #咖啡日常 #慢生活
